item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: A reminder that tomorrow is a pre-paid Dress Down Day

item.title: A message from the Guidance Office:
item.description: St. Mother Teresa school is looking for Grade 10 student volunteers to help with a Grade 6 Graduation Party. The event takes place on Saturday, June 20th from 5 to 9 p.m. at the hall above Russell Arena. If you’re interested or want more details, please see Ms. Timmins.

item.title: A message from: Mr. Longval:
item.description: Attention: Grade 9's to 11's! Anyone interested in playing tackle football in the fall for the Varsity Team, we will be having a pre-camp- May 25, 27 and June 1 and 3. Please sign up outside Mr. Longval's office. Sign-ups close Wednesday May 13.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminding all Varsity Ultimate athletes we have a practice today after school.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Varsity Track athletes are reminded they can come throw, run and/or jump today afterschool. Please touch base with Mr. Longval if you are planning on attending.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: This is a reminder that the deadline for Little Caesars pizza orders is this Sunday! Please talk to your parents about getting some tasty “Zaaa” for the family and complete your order online! If you have any questions, please see Mr. Vonesch
